steps.description: Go to claude.ai and sign in to your account.
Click Projects in the left sidebar of Claude.
Click New Project to create your Minion's base.
Name it after your Minion - example: KEVIN's Heist Base.

steps.copy_value: Planning for Heist to the Sun

cards.title: Add Instructions
cards.description: Copy the instructions below and paste into the instructions field.

cards.title: Upload Mission Data
cards.description: Download the mission data file and upload it under Files.

cards.title: Meet & Test Your Minion
cards.description: Run both prompts inside your Project to meet your Minion and verify their memory.

prompts.label: Meet Your Minion
prompts.description: Open your Project, start a new chat, and ask your Minion who they are.

prompts.label: Test the Memory
prompts.description: Open another new chat and ask your Minion about the mission data.

mission.title: Find the Answers
mission.description: Ask your Minion the 5 mission questions to plan the heist.

bonus.title: Bonus Tool
bonus.description: Ask your Minion to invent one unique tool based on what the data revealed.
